usage_reset_info: Storage usage resets on the 1st of each month.
usage_error_description: We couldn't load the usage data. Try again in a moment.
usage_health_healthy_desc: You have plenty of storage left. Keep an eye on media uploads to stay comfortably under your limit.
usage_health_attention_desc: Storage is getting close to the plan limit. Review the largest categories or upgrade before uploads slow down.
usage_health_critical_desc: Storage is almost full. Free up space or move to a larger plan to avoid blocked uploads.
usage_over_critical_milestone: You are above the critical usage milestone.
usage_largest_category_desc: This category accounts for {amount}. Start here when you need to reclaim storage quickly.
usage_cleanup_desc: Archive old {category}, remove duplicates, or move rarely used files to a lower-cost workspace.
usage_cleanup_accessible_hint: This recommendation is informational and does not start cleanup automatically.
